protection_rules: READ_ONLY: _INDRA_PROTOCOL_ folder is the core engine.
WRITE_ALLOWED: /src/ is the business satellite area.
CONFIG_OVERRIDE: Always use indra_config.js for local pathing.
canonical_sync_routine: 2. Run 'git submodule update --remote' if out of sync
3. Verify indra_config.js exists (copy from sample if missing)
